name: Kedzie Chicago Currency Exchange
description_short: Kedzie Chicago Currency Exchange offers check cashing, money transfers, bill pay, and government services like vehicle registration and title transfers at a single location.
description_long:
Kedzie Chicago Currency Exchange is a currency exchange and check-cashing service located at 801 N Kedzie in Chicago's Bucktown neighborhood. The company operates as part of the Currency Exchange Association and has been serving the community with extended hours (7 AM–8 PM weekdays, 10 AM–6 PM Sunday) since at least the time of this profile.

The company offers a broad suite of financial services beyond traditional check cashing. Core services include check cashing (personal and business), money orders, money transfers, wire services, and electronic bill pay. They also provide ATM access, prepaid card loading, credit card cash advances, and debit card unload services. Notably, they serve as an authorized government service provider, handling vehicle registration, license plate renewals, city vehicle stickers, and Cook County vital records (birth, marriage, death certificates). Additional services include foreign currency exchange, notary public services, and various convenience items like postage stamps and Ventra transit cards.

What distinguishes Kedzie Chicago Currency Exchange is their positioning as a one-stop alternative to traditional banking institutions, marketing themselves around the concept of personal service and convenience. They emphasize that consumers can handle multiple financial and administrative needs in a single location rather than visiting multiple providers. Their extended hours and bilingual service (English and Spanish) serve the diverse neighborhood demographic.

However, the company's service mix—while broad—does not constitute lending or credit services. They function primarily as a transaction facilitator and government service intermediary. The website provides limited information about pricing, fee structures, or specific terms. Consumers should contact them directly (773-533-3225) to understand exact costs for services like check cashing, money transfers, or currency exchange, as these vary significantly by provider.
pros: One-stop service for check cashing, money transfers, bill pay, and government services like vehicle registration
Extended hours (7 AM–8 PM weekdays, 10 AM–6 PM Sunday) accommodate working individuals and families
Bilingual service in English and Spanish
On-site ATM access for immediate cash withdrawal
Authorized government service provider for Cook County documents and Illinois vehicle registration
Offers both personal and business check cashing
Multiple payment options including electronic bill pay, money orders, and prepaid cards
cons: Website does not disclose check cashing fees, money transfer costs, or foreign exchange rates—consumers must call for pricing
Limited to Chicago location; not a nationwide service
No online account opening or remote services; all transactions require in-person visits
No lending products or credit-building services available
Minimal information about identity verification requirements or maximum transaction limits
best_for: Unbanked and underbanked individuals in the Bucktown/Kedzie area needing check cashing and bill payment
Chicago residents who need vehicle registration, license plate renewals, or vital records in one location
Spanish-speaking consumers preferring bilingual service options
Small business owners requiring business check cashing and money transfer services
diagnosis: Kedzie Chicago Currency Exchange is best for unbanked and underbanked Chicago residents who need check cashing, money transfer, bill payment, and government services in one convenient location with extended hours. The main caveat is that pricing information is not disclosed online—consumers must call directly to compare fees against other check-cashing providers, and the service is location-specific with no remote options available.
services: License plate renewals and new plates
Prepaid Visa cards and phone products
